channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-06-08 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [06/08] Pittsburgh Grindcore Night w/ Morgue Breath, Retorsion, Thlurm Barbaro, Moisty, Mandatory Abortion, Underneath @ Roboto Project
item.description:
ASM Booking presents a 7-band grindcore extravaganza at The Mr. Roboto Project featuring touring acts from California, Hungary, and Indiana.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] Derya Yıldırım & Grup Şimşek @ Tech 25
item.description:
Anatolian folk-psychedelia outfit Derya Yıldırım &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Grup Şimşek live at Tech 25, presented by Secret Planet.

Venue: Tech 25

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] Stygian Bough with 40 Watt Sun @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Stygian Bough (a Bell Witch and Aerial Ruin collaboration) performs with 40 Watt Sun (solo) at Bottlerocket Social Hall.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] PGHwrites: Damon Young’s “That’s How They Get You” (Paperback Release) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
It's the paperback release of Damon Young's riotous anthology, featuring work by Hanif Abdurraqib, Mahogany L. Browne, Wyatt Cenac, Kiese Laymon, Deesha Philyaw, Roy Wood Jr., Nicola Yoon, and more.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/09] Artist in Exile: Oleksandr Frazé-Frazénko’s Ceramic Knives (Ukrainian Spring Songs) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Join Writer-in-Residence Oleksandr Frazé-Frazénko and wife Mari Frazé-Frazénko as they share their spellbinding sound for a night of reimagined Eastern European songs.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/09] Punk Night w/ The Uncouth, Last Protocol, DJ Drago @ Rock Room
item.description:
A punk-fueled night featuring The Uncouth, Last Protocol, and DJ Drago at the Rock Room.

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/09] Devon Lamarr & Don Orfio @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Devon Lamarr and Don Orfio perform live at Thunderbird Music Hall on June 9th, 2026.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Skrom / Hand in Pants / Geese Teeth / Friends for Sale @ Roboto Project
item.description:
A multi-band all-ages show at Mr. Roboto Project featuring Skrom, Hand in Pants, Geese Teeth, and Friends for Sale.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] The Dream Eaters w/ Take Me With You @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Brooklyn's The Dream Eaters visit Pittsburgh and their bestest friends Take Me With You for a night of synth-pop and dark comedy.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Turnover with Narrow Head and She's Green @ Spirit
item.description:
Turnover headlines Spirit Hall in Pittsburgh with support from Narrow Head and She's Green on June 10.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Landlady with Pat Kelly @ Baum Baum Club
item.description:
Landlady performs live at Baum Club with support from Pat Kelly on June 10th.

Venue: Baum Baum Club

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Drum and Bass Night - 2nd Wednesdays @ The Government Center
item.description:
An all-vinyl drum and bass night at The Government Center featuring Moemaw Naedon, Chocolate Milk Mountain, and special guests.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Achieva N'at @ Helltown Brewing
item.description:
Achieva N'at is your chance to unwind with friends while supporting people with disabilities and their families.

Venue: Helltown Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Horace Pinker / Fuck Yeah, Dinosaurs / Nightmarathons @ The Government Center
item.description:
A three-band punk/rock show at The Government Center in Pittsburgh featuring Horace Pinker, Fuck Yeah Dinosaurs, and Nightmarathons.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Desert Sharks with Century III, The Elastics, Blott @ Spirit
item.description:
Desert Sharks headline a four-band rock night at Spirit Lodge with Century III, The Elastics, and Blott.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Deceptor, Vicious Blade, and Septic Idols @ Rock Room
item.description:
A brutal death/thrash metal night at the Rock Room featuring Deceptor, Vicious Blade, and Septic Idols

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Get Dahn Uptown @ Trace Echo
item.description:
A free recurring live music night at Trace Echo every 2nd and 4th Thursday from 8PM to 10PM.

Venue: Trace Echo

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Lástima / Wretched Blessing / Mound of Orchids / Pyrithe @ Brillobox
item.description:
An evening of ripping and strange riffs with out of town guests Lástima and Wretched Blessing

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Braddock Art Crawl @ PearlArts Movement &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Sound
item.description:
A multi-venue art crawl along Braddock Ave with the theme 'Art is Out of This World!'

Venue: PearlArts Movement &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Sound

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Garden Party: Gothic @ Mattress Factory
item.description:
Mattress Factory's annual Garden Party goes Gothic with performances, dancing, art auction, and costume contest.

Venue: Mattress Factory

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Ether.net live at Poetry Lounge @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Ether.net’s For Cyber Sake Tour makes a stop in Pittsburgh at Poetry Lounge with support from Bella Figlia, The Alfomega, and Print

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Shrimp Hat, Almost Exactly Like Julia, Patti Spadaro celebrate new releases @ Allegheny Brewing
item.description:
Come celebrate original music made in Pittsburgh with this trio of indie rock/jam band lineup.

Venue: Allegheny Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Lawrenceville Pride '26: Opening Night Benefit @ Spirit
item.description:
Lawrenceville Pride's opening night benefit party featuring DJ sets, drag, burlesque, voguing, flash tattoos, and a vendor market at Spirit Lodge.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Unmade Place: Sound Text Experiments @ Telephone
item.description:
An experimental sound and text performance event featuring local and visiting artists at Telephone in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Telephone

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Divine Comedy @ Ormsby Cafe
item.description:
Gustav WAV. &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Work in Progress present Divine Comedy, a night of Techno, Trance, and Hard Dance at Ormsby Basement.

Venue: Ormsby Cafe

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] TWIRL: Pride Edition @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
TWIRL returns for a Pride Edition house music party at Bottle Rocket featuring DJs Firestone, Ricky Mawzlin, Rojo, and Smoko.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Longturn Music Presents: Pleasurekraft @ Side Quest
item.description:
Longturn Music brings techno heavyweight Pleasurekraft (Kraftek) to Pittsburgh with support from Sertac Sahin, Coachelly, and Borealis.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Sleeping Witch & Saturn, Guest(s) of Kin, Common Loon @ Gooskis
item.description:
A night of reverie featuring Sleeping Witch &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Saturn, Guest(s) of Kin, and Common Loon at Gooski's.

Venue: Gooskis

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] WET: Body Drencher @ Brillobox
item.description:
WET presents Body Drencher with Madame Trio and Gun Ray at Brillobox on Friday June 12th.

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Fuckboy Summer Vol. 1 @ Gallery AFK
item.description:
A late night, feral summer dance party at Gallery AFK featuring five DJs on a Funktion-One sound system.

Venue: Gallery AFK

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Allentown Night Market @ The Weeping Glass
item.description:
A most curious bi-annual outdoor night market in Pittsburgh's Allentown neighborhood featuring over 100 unusual artists and vendors.

Venue: The Weeping Glass

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Crisp Lake Album Release @ Death Comes Lifting
item.description:
636 E Warrington Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15210

Venue: Death Comes Lifting

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Mariposas Galácticas + Brassica and the Wild Sprouts @ Pierogi Palace
item.description:
cumbia klezmer punk from Philly meets local party brass

Venue: Pierogi Palace

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] DJ Slugo: Longevity Tour with Seams @ Spirit
item.description:
DJ Slugo brings his Longevity Tour to Spirit Lodge in Pittsburgh with support from Seams.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Day Aches / Eyewash / Spiral / Surface Broadcast @ Hippo House
item.description:
Four-band indie/punk showcase at Hippo House featuring Day Aches from Washington DC alongside local acts Eyewash, Spiral, and Surface Broadcast.

Venue: Hippo House

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Pummeled, Ritual Bronze, Walker & The Rebellion @ Remedy
item.description:
A night of Pittsburgh power pop, Cleveland emo, and Pittsburgh rock at Remedy on Butler Street.

Venue: Remedy

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Badklaat with Wurm, Oblation & Ruck @ Side Quest
item.description:
Headlining DJ Badklaat brings heavy bass music to Sidequest on 44th with support from Wurm, Oblation (world debut), and Ruck.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] VAMP @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Official afterparty to the Allentown Night Market featuring drag performances and DJ Allinaline at BottleRocket Social Hall.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Pittsburgh UFO Club: UFO Conference and UFO Book Sale @ Fungus Books
item.description:
The Pittsburgh UFO Club hosts a UFO conference, book sale, speakers, and poetry at Fungus Books and Records backyard.

Venue: Fungus Books

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Pittsburgh Jazz Listening Session @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:
Vinyl listening session of classic Pittsburgh jazz recordings.

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] PGHwrites: Ed Simon’s “American Elegy: Reflections on 250 Years of the Dis-United States” (Book Launch) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Ed Simon presents 50 short chapters that are asynchronously organized works of flash criticism, meant to draw connections across time periods, which each celebrate an aspect of an expanded and broader “America.”

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Plastic Wildflowers, Bat St. Chip, Some Pepper, Dylan Zeh + @ Incurably Optimistic
item.description:
Accoustic natural and experimental sounds from Plastic Wildflowers, Bat St. Chip, Some Pepper, Dylan Zeh, and more in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Incurably Optimistic

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Doused Sparkler East Coast 2026 - Pittsburgh @ The Government Center
item.description:
Doused Sparkler brings their East Coast 2026 tour to Pittsburgh with support from Blinder and James Castle.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Foundation Improv Series 28 @ Bantha Tea Bar
item.description:
A night of long form improv from the OIL community

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/15] Pocket Gummi / Scrum Force / Deftcat / King Blue Heron @ The Government Center
item.description:
Four-band indie/punk showcase at The Government Center in Pittsburgh, presented by Kame House.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/15] Chamber Music Pittsburgh Presents: The Cowboy Evolves — Journeys Through the Music of the Americas @ City of Asylum
item.description:
This Pittsburgh Performs concert, curated by Carlos Clark, features music by composers from the US, Uruguay, and Brazil, offering a vibrant vision of discovery while simultaneously reflecting on the complex history of the Americas.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/15] Worm at Thunderbird @ Thunderbird
item.description:
NECROMANTIC BLACK DOOM

Venue: Thunderbird
